name: Western Union Money Order Only
description_short: Jacksonville, FL at 4324 Atlantic Blvd is home to Western Union Money Order Only, offering 24/7 money order and check-cashing services.
description_long:
Western Union Money Order Only at 4324 Atlantic Blvd is a 24-hour money order and check-cashing destination in Jacksonville, FL. This standalone location operates continuously, providing convenient access for Jacksonville residents and visitors needing services at any time, day or night.

At this Jacksonville, FL location, you can quickly access money order and check-cashing services. For specific service details or availability, call +1 904-398-5140.

Jacksonville residents who need money orders or check-cashing services outside traditional hours can rely on this 24/7 Atlantic Blvd destination. Bring a valid photo ID and your cash or checks. This is your round-the-clock option for money order processing in Jacksonville.
pros: Extensive network of 400+ agent locations across US including Walmart and major grocery chains
Long operational history since 1851 with established fraud prevention and encryption security
Hybrid online-to-in-person option: register transfers online or through app, then pay cash at agent location to save time
Multiple payment methods accepted: cash, debit card, and credit card at select locations
Money orders provide trusted alternative to checks for secure cash payments
Prepaid Visa card option for receiving funds with no minimum balance or credit check required
MTCN tracking system allows both sender and recipient to verify transfer status
cons: No currency exchange services available at agent locations despite international transfer capability
Pricing and fees vary significantly by transfer method, payment option, and destination—lacks transparent upfront pricing
Documented service delays for specific international corridors (e.g., Orange Wallet in Cameroon)
Agent location hours vary by host business; no standardized operating schedule
First online international transfer fee waiver only applies to online channel, not in-person transactions
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked consumers who prefer cash-based in-person transactions
Senders making frequent domestic or international money transfers to family or friends
Consumers needing to send secure payments via money order instead of checks
Individuals seeking convenient bill payment options at nearby retail locations
diagnosis: Western Union is best for consumers who conduct frequent in-person money transfers, lack bank accounts, or prefer cash-based transactions. Primary caveat: pricing and fees lack transparency upfront and vary significantly by transfer method and destination—users must use their cost calculator to compare options, and international transfers to certain corridors may experience delays.
services: International in-person money transfers with real-time exchange rates
Money order purchase and cashing at participating locations
Utility, rent, and car payment processing at agent locations
Cash pickup for recipients using MTCN
Online and mobile app transfer initiation with in-person payment completion
Western Union Prepaid Visa Card funding and account access
Bill payment services at participating agent locations
Money Transfer Control Number (MTCN) generation and tracking
Bank partner in-person money transfer services at select financial institutions
Retail location money transfer services through Walmart and grocery chains
meta_description: Jacksonville, FL: Western Union Money Order Only at 4324 Atlantic Blvd. 24-hour money order and check-cashing services.
